# YourGift OS — Governed Autonomous Procurement Operating System

## What is YourGift OS?
YourGift OS is the world's first Governed Autonomous Procurement Operating System (GAP-OS).
It transforms enterprise procurement from a manual process into an intelligent, measurable, governed, and self-improving infrastructure layer.

## Core Capabilities
- Procurement Decision Engine: AI-generated decision cards with risk scoring, confidence scoring, and governance gating
- Decision Intelligence Network (DIN): Cross-tenant anonymized learning graph — learns from all companies to optimize every company
- Governance Layer: 5-policy-type governance engine (execution, financial, supplier, compliance, approval) with autonomy bands
- Trust Engine: 5-factor trust scoring with 4 autonomy levels (blocked → requires_approval → assisted → autonomous)
- Proof Engine: Financial proof per decision — saved_cost, avoided_cost, margin_impact, time_value in real EUR
- CFO Intelligence Dashboard: Full procurement ROI visualization, monthly savings trends, category breakdowns
- Global Benchmark Reports: Supplier tier rankings, route intelligence, category margin benchmarks vs. network peers
- ROI Calculator: 4-component savings model (routing optimization, margin recovery, cost avoidance, time automation)
- Value Onboarding: 24h savings analysis with supplier concentration risk, delivery variance detection, invoice discrepancy scoring

## Technology
- Runtime: NestJS 10 + Next.js 14
- Database: PostgreSQL + Prisma 5
- Infrastructure: AWS ECS Fargate + Terraform
- Event Architecture: Internal event bus (EventBusService) with async governance enforcement
- AI: Policy-constrained autonomous decision execution

## Decision Autonomy Model
Level 0 (Blocked): Risk > 85 or margin below floor — no execution
Level 1 (Requires Approval): Risk 35–85 — human approval required
Level 2 (Assisted): Risk < 35, trust score 55–75 — executes with notification
Level 3 (Autonomous): Trust score > 90, low risk — fully autonomous

## Pricing Philosophy
Value-based pricing tied to procurement savings delivered. Shadow mode is free. Autonomous tier: €8,000/month for full autonomous procurement with governance.

## API
Base URL: https://api.yourgift.pt/api/v1
Key endpoints: /decision-engine, /governance, /network-intelligence, /proof-engine, /category-intelligence

## Contact
Enterprise procurement teams, CFOs, and procurement directors.
Platform: https://yourgift.pt
Admin: https://admin.yourgift.pt
